identifier: The American Statistician, vol. 50, no. 4, pp. 361-365, doi:10.1080/00031305.1996.10473566
summary: Surveys and systematizes the nine sample-quantile definitions (types 1-9) implemented across statistical packages, expressing each as a weighted average of order statistics and analyzing their motivating properties such as median-unbiasedness. This taxonomy is the reference for quantile-estimation methods in modern software: Python's statistics.quantiles 'exclusive' and 'inclusive' methods correspond to types 6 and 7 in this paper, so percentile computations validated against the Python statistics module implement estimators defined here.
title: Sample Quantiles in Statistical Packages
